Explanation: The strongest evidence comes from [19264], which states that Tony Curtis was born Bernard Schwartz. Tony Curtis starred in many 1960s movies and was married to Christine Kaufmann, who was born in Germany. Curtis died in 2010, which fits the death window. While there are some mismatches (Curtis was born in the 1920s, not 1940s, and Kaufmann died in 2017, not between 1983-1994), no other candidate fits more clues. The city connection (New York City, same as glassmaker Louis Comfort Tiffany) also aligns.
Exact Answer: Bernard Schwartz
Confidence: 75%
